name: Guards II: Prologue
short_description: Assemble a team of four brave heroes and embark on a nightmarish journey through the circles of Hell, filled with demons and ancient horrors! The free tactical game Guards II: Prologue will immerse you in battles inspired by myths from various cultures. Are you ready to challenge the darkness?
detailed_description:
WISHLIST THE FULL GAME


About the Game

Guards II: Prologue is a free turn-based tactical game with simple yet deep mechanics. Swap heroes to attack enemies, strategize several steps ahead, and claim victory in deadly combat!

Prepare for seven challenging missions where you’ll fight through legions of hellish creatures using the amazing abilities and talents of your heroes. Protect the human world from demons and defeat the cunning boss threatening all of humanity!

Guards II: Prologue features:

👹 Four heroes with unique fighting styles, special attacks, super abilities, and varying resistances to damage.

👹 An original turn-based battle system where every move counts. Mistakes come at a high cost!

👹 Magical artifacts and runes that empower your team and unlock new tactics.

👹 Three dark biomes with a distinctive atmosphere and enemies inspired by Egyptian, Slavic, and Western European myths.

⚔ Test your skills in Guards II: Prologue today! And don’t forget to add the main game, Guards II: Chaos in Hell, to your Wishlist to continue the adventure!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Turkish
